recommendations.title: American Mary
recommendations.overview: A young medical student struggling to pay tuition is drawn into the shady world of underground body-modification.

recommendations.title: Rabid
recommendations.overview: The quiet Rose works in women's fashion clothing, hoping to be a designer. A traffic accident damages her face. She gets experimental stem cell treatment, leaving her stronger and prettier than ever - but there's a side effect.

recommendations.title: See No Evil 2
recommendations.overview: A group of friends pays a late-night visit to the city morgue to surprise Amy on her birthday. But the surprise is on them when the one-eyed corpse of brutal psychopath Jacob Goodnight unexpectedly rises from a cold sub-basement slab, turning their w

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: ABCs of Death 2
recommendations.overview: Taking all that was great from the first instalment, the movie aims to be a wilder, leaner, faster-paced and even more entertaining anthology this time around, with a new crop of award-winning, visionary filmmakers from around the globe.
recommendations.director: Jen Soska, Robert Morgan, Julian Barratt, Juan Martínez Moreno, Hajime Ohata, Bruno Samper, Jim Hosking, Rodney Ascher, Jerome Sable, Marvin Kren, Todd Rohal, Sôichi Umezawa, Chris Nash, Alexandre Bustillo, Alejandro Brugués, Dennison Ramalho, Wolfgang Matzl, Aharon Keshales, Julian Gilbey, Kristina Buožytė, Robert Boocheck, E.L. Katz, Julien Maury, Larry Fessenden, Bill Plympton, Lancelot Oduwa Imasuen, Sylvia Soska, Steven Kostanski, Erik Matti, Vincenzo Natali, Navot Papushado

recommendations.title: Papillon
recommendations.overview: A man befriends a fellow criminal as the two of them begin serving their sentence on a dreadful prison island, which inspires the man to plot his escape.

recommendations.title: Dirty Harry
recommendations.overview: When a madman dubbed 'Scorpio' terrorizes San Francisco, hard-nosed cop, Harry Callahan – famous for his take-no-prisoners approach to law enforcement – is tasked with hunting down the psychopath.

recommendations.title: Creed III
recommendations.overview: After dominating the boxing world, Adonis Creed has thrived in his career and family life. When a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy, Damian Anderson, resurfaces after serving a long sentence in prison, he is eager to prove that he deserves h

recommendations.title: The Long Goodbye
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Hollywood, Detective Philip Marlowe tries to help a friend who is accused of murdering his wife.

recommendations.title: The Menendez Brothers
recommendations.overview: Serving life in prison for murdering their parents, Lyle and Erik Menendez speak out in this documentary explaining the shocking crime and ensuing trials.
